title: [MEDIUM] Dashboards issue — Zephyr Logistics
text:
Customer: Zephyr Logistics (Mid-Market)
Product area: Dashboards
Priority: medium
Status: resolved

Description: The dashboard takes 10 seconds to load when I have more than 10000 widgets. It's unusable for our morning standup.

Support notes: Reproduced on our side. Added to backlog.
